final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu cover image for pearl milk tea with a pink girly aesthetic and summer refreshing vibe.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu grass-planting cover photo, soft pink girly aesthetic, styled product shot
Composition: close-up or slightly overhead angle, subject centered with breathing room for top text overlay
Subject: pearl milk tea drink, condensation on cup, tapioca pearls visible through the cup
Scene/backdrop: light airy summer backdrop, soft pastel pink tones, subtle summer props (flowers, ice cubes, or light fabric)
Lighting/mood: bright, soft diffused light, cool refreshing summer feel
Color palette: pastel pink, creamy white, light peach, translucent bubble-tea brown accents
Materials/textures: dewy condensation on cup surface, glossy pearls, soft fabric or petal textures in background
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must feel scroll-stopping for Xiaohongshu feed, girly and fresh, not dark or moody
Avoid: dark backgrounds, heavy shadows, overly saturated neon tones, cluttered props
